title: Comparing Your Real Options for Selling PDF Guides Without Gumroad Without the Gatekeepers
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria trying to sell PDF guides without Gumroad, you're not alone. You've probably tried alternative platforms only to find they come with their own set of limitations and fees. It's time to break free from these gatekeepers and explore true alternatives. Selling digital products shouldn't be a complicated endeavor, but it can be when you're restricted from using popular payment processors. You need a solution that works seamlessly with your business model, without the hassle of complicated integrations or costly fees. Your real options are limited, and it's time to explore them.
What Each Option Actually Offers

When it comes to selling digital products, Gumroad was once the go-to solution for creators. However, its limitations on restricted countries left many digital creators like you in Nigeria searching for alternatives. The biggest issue with Gumroad is its reliance on payment processors like PayPal and Stripe, which are not available to creators in restricted countries. This leaves you with limited options for selling your digital guides. Instead, consider using platforms that don't rely on these payment processors, such as crypto-native infrastructure. This type of infrastructure allows you to sell your digital products directly to customers without the need for intermediaries. With this solution, you have full control over your business model, including the pricing, delivery, and sales process.
